content: Sorry! We will human translate Aurita's Psyche Deepdive along with 5 other side story chapters in the upcoming update next week!

will fix in a week, Erica's Psyche Deepdive will get human translation too!

As for other currently machine translated side stories, we're recording all your feedback and will fix them when they're human translated. We expect to be able to human translate all of them in a couple months!
Sorry! We're giving these chapters a second pass to eliminate the issues

It's actually a common twist on the phrase when it's portrayed in a more formal or sophisticated manner, leaning on you've being a contraction of you have.

It's also a little archaic -- one example of its usage is from Marilyn Monroe in a 1953 production.
There is also a small correction that could be made to the 24 exalt description in aqueor, as said in this post https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1517136834461831358
